SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-08-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH GRECO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY WILLIAM GOMEZ IS NOT PRESENT.
